title: CEFC Welcomes Additional $2 Billion Capital Allocation from Australian Government
content: The CEFC welcomed an additional $2 billion capital allocation from the Australian Government, raising its investment capacity to $32.5 billion, pending parliamentary approval. This marks the first increase in its General Portfolio since 2012. CEFC CEO Ian Learmonth highlighted the fundingâ€™s role in accelerating renewable energy, storage, and clean energy investments, contributing to Australiaâ€™s emissions goals and supporting over 60,000 energy jobs by 2040. To date, CEFC has committed $14.2 billion across 300 transactions with a total value exceeding $62 billion.
author: Analysts Account
